mprVisibility.Description: Control visibility of various objects and elements on selected views
mprVisibility.t23: Visibility of category "{0}" cannot be changed on the view
mprVisibility.t27: A template is applied to the current view. Links visibility will be changed in the template
mprVisibility.t28: A template is applied to the current view. DWG imports visibility will be changed in the template
mprVisibility.t29: A template is applied to the current view. Point clouds visibility will be changed in the template
mprVisibility.t30: A template is applied to the current view. Worksets visibility will be changed in the template
mprVisibility.t31: Model categories are defined by the view template. Categories visibility will be changed in the template
mprVisibility.t32: Annotation categories are defined by the view template. Categories visibility will be changed in the template
mprVisibility.t33: Analytical model categories are defined by the view template. Categories visibility will be changed in the template
mprVisibility.t39: There are no linked files in the current document
mprVisibility.t40: There are no DWG imports in the current document
mprVisibility.t41: There are no point clouds in the current document
mprVisibility.t42: The current document is not workshared
